questionHtml: Calculate the amount Yejin needs to have saved into her annuity fund, in order to meet her retirement goal.
markschemeHtml:
Use of finance solver           M1

N = 360, I = 5%, Pmt = 4000, FV = 0, PpY = 12, CpY = 1           A1

$755000 (correct to 3 s.f.)           A1

[3 marks]
